evidence.notes: Evidence collection is not part of the current assessment.

limitations: This advisory result is not legal certification.
Assessment answers have not been independently verified.
Source references support further review and do not prove applicability or compliance.
Professional review may be required before acting on legal, payroll, tax or employment obligations.

sources.title: Ministry of Labour and Employment
sources.notes: Official ministry portal supplied for authoritative labour and employment information. The portal does not verify the assessed organisation or determine applicability by itself.

sources.title: India Code
sources.publisher: Legislative Department, Ministry of Law and Justice, Government of India
sources.notes: Official legislation database supplied for further statutory research. A listed enactment must not be treated as applicable without evaluating the organisation's facts and jurisdiction.

rules.title: Primary operating state review
rules.description: Determines whether the organisation has supplied the jurisdiction information needed for state-specific review.

matched.reason: A primary operating state was supplied, so state-specific employment and workplace requirements can be reviewed.

recommendation.title: Review state-specific requirements
recommendation.action: Use the confirmed primary operating state to identify which state-specific employment, workplace and establishment requirements require professional review.
recommendation.timeline: Before relying on state-specific compliance guidance
limitations: Supplying a state does not establish that a particular state law applies.
Multi-state operations may require separate review for each location.

notMatched.reason: The supplied primary-state fact did not contain a usable value.

missing.reason: The primary operating state is missing, so state-specific requirements cannot be evaluated.

recommendation.title: Confirm the primary operating state
recommendation.action: Confirm the headquarters or principal operating state before relying on state-specific guidance.
limitations: No state-specific applicability conclusion has been reached.

rules.title: Employment documentation review
rules.description: Identifies organisations reporting one or more employees for an advisory employment-documentation review.

matched.reason: The organisation reported one or more employees, making an employment-documentation review relevant to its current workforce.

recommendation.title: Review employment documentation
recommendation.action: Review offer letters, employment terms, onboarding records and related workforce documentation against the organisation's current operating context.
limitations: The assessment does not inspect or verify employment documents.
Required documentation may vary by worker category, location and applicable law.

notMatched.reason: The organisation reported no current employees, so the employee-documentation review condition is not currently met.

missing.reason: Employee count is missing, so the workforce documentation rule cannot be evaluated.

recommendation.title: Confirm the employee count
recommendation.action: Confirm the approximate number of current employees before evaluating workforce-related recommendations.
limitations: No workforce-size applicability conclusion has been reached.

rules.title: Multi-location operating-practice review
rules.description: Identifies organisations operating from more than one permanent location.

matched.reason: The reported location count indicates that the organisation operates from multiple permanent locations.

recommendation.title: Review multi-location workplace practices
recommendation.action: Review whether workplace policies, notices, records, ownership and employee communications are consistently managed across permanent locations.
limitations: This rule identifies operating complexity and does not determine registration or filing requirements.
Each location may require separate jurisdiction-specific review.

notMatched.reason: The reported location count does not currently indicate multiple permanent operating locations.

missing.reason: The multi-location indicator could not be derived because sufficient location information was not supplied.

recommendation.title: Confirm the permanent location count
recommendation.action: Confirm the number of offices, plants, branches and other permanent operating sites.
limitations: No multi-location conclusion has been reached.

rules.title: Distributed workforce review
rules.description: Identifies organisations whose working model or remote-work answers indicate a distributed workforce.

matched.reason: The supplied working-model information indicates that at least part of the workforce operates across remote, hybrid, field-based or mixed arrangements.

recommendation.title: Review distributed-work practices
recommendation.action: Review working-arrangement expectations, communication practices, manager responsibilities, record handling and location-specific considerations for distributed workers.
limitations: This rule does not determine worker location, tax residence or employment-law jurisdiction.
Individual working arrangements may require specialist review.

notMatched.reason: The supplied working-model information does not currently indicate a distributed workforce.

missing.reason: The distributed-workforce indicator could not be derived from the supplied working-model information.

recommendation.title: Confirm the working model
recommendation.action: Confirm whether the workforce is primarily office-based, hybrid, remote, field-based, plant-based or mixed.
limitations: No distributed-workforce conclusion has been reached.

rules.title: Rapid-change workforce planning review
rules.description: Identifies organisations reporting significant hiring growth or active expansion plans.

matched.reason: The organisation reported significant hiring growth, active expansion or both, making structured workforce planning relevant.

recommendation.title: Create a workforce plan
recommendation.action: Document expected roles, hiring sequence, ownership, onboarding capacity, manager capacity and People-function support for the planned change.
recommendation.timeline: Before major hiring or expansion begins
limitations: This recommendation is based on reported plans rather than verified forecasts.
The assessment does not evaluate financial capacity or labour-market availability.

notMatched.reason: The supplied growth information does not currently indicate significant hiring growth or active expansion.

missing.reason: Neither hiring-direction nor expansion information was available for evaluation.

recommendation.title: Confirm expected workforce changes
recommendation.action: Confirm expected hiring and expansion activity for the next 12 to 18 months.
limitations: No growth-readiness conclusion has been reached.

rules.title: People-governance ownership review
rules.description: Identifies organisations where the supplied People-function model does not indicate a dedicated HR team or dedicated HR professional.

matched.reason: The supplied People-function model does not indicate a dedicated internal HR team or dedicated HR professional.

recommendation.title: Assign clear People-governance ownership
recommendation.action: Name an accountable owner for employment documentation, workforce records, policy review, employee concerns and professional escalation.
limitations: A named owner does not replace specialist legal, payroll, tax or HR support.
The assessment does not evaluate the capability or authority of the current owner.

notMatched.reason: The organisation reported a dedicated HR team or dedicated HR professional.

missing.reason: The current People-function model was not supplied, so governance ownership cannot be evaluated.

recommendation.title: Confirm the People-function model
recommendation.action: Confirm who currently owns People and HR decisions, records, policies and employee support.
limitations: No People-governance ownership conclusion has been reached.

rules.title: Policies and compliance priority
rules.description: Identifies when the user explicitly selected policies and compliance as an advisory priority.

matched.reason: Policies and compliance was explicitly selected as an area where guidance would be useful.

recommendation.title: Review the policy framework
recommendation.action: Create an inventory of current workforce policies, identify ownership and review dates, and prioritise missing or outdated materials for professional review.
limitations: Selecting a priority does not establish that a particular policy is legally required.
The assessment does not inspect existing policies or verify their adequacy.

notMatched.reason: Policies and compliance was not selected as a current advisory priority.

missing.reason: No advisory priorities were supplied, so the selected-priority rule cannot be evaluated.
